title: Unidentified Rebel script
content:

{{Script

|users=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>

A '''script''' was used on a door in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion's]] [[Echo Base/Legends|hidden base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="ESB" />

It was present on a label on a door that was passed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] on their way to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:RebelScriptUncut.png|thumb|left|250px|The unidentified writing on a sign in [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].]]
Due to the angle of the scene, it is unclear whether this script is [[Unidentified script (Star Wars '76)|Star Wars '76]] designed by [[Joe Johnston]], [[Common Sith]] or some other as yet unidentified script.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Trilogy Arcade]]''
*{{Film|V}}
